name: Tomographic Injection reconstituting the full d=12 Structural Classification

phase_0.domain_name: Tomographic Injection reconstituting the full d=12 Structural Classification
phase_0.boundary_condition: The Crystal of Types (17,280,000-element lattice sealing the joint outcome space)

VINIT.justification: The void state before any primitive axes or measurement bases are defined.

TANCH.justification: The 17,280,000-element lattice that hermetically seals and bounds all admissible joint primitive assignments.

AFWD.justification: Forward morphism broadcasting the fiducial vector into the 144 SIC projectors via clock and shift operators.

AREV.justification: Reverse morphism synthesizing missing POVM elements from cross-primitive stream correlations.

CLINK.justification: Sequential composition linking the 144 probability outcomes to their dual SIC projector basis.

IMSCRIB.justification: The self-referential generating vector; the measurement space imscribes itself through this identity state.

FSPLIT.justification: Splits the density matrix ρ into exact SIC probabilities (T-arm) and physical ig-pulse stream readings (F-arm).

FFUSE.justification: Fuses the exact probabilities and synthesized stream data back into the original density matrix ρ.

EVALT.justification: Affirmative branch: frame potential achieves F=143/169 and pairwise overlaps are exactly 1/13.

EVALF.justification: Negative branch: physical ig-pulse streams exhibit non-uniform overlaps and only 24/144 direct coverage.

ENGAGR.justification: Paraconsistent paradice: the absorbing primitive holds structural contradictions at the measurement boundary without logical explosion.

IFIX.justification: Permanent, append-only fixation of the reconstructed state and fiducial vector with no information loss.

phase_3.void_description: Unmeasured structural void in C^12 before primitive axes are instantiated.
phase_3.true_description: Exact SIC-distributed measurement with uniform frame bounds and zero reconstruction entropy.
phase_3.false_description: Heteroskedastic POVM with incomplete stream coverage and non-uniform empirical overlaps.
phase_3.both_description: Paraconsistent criticality (⊙) absorbing structural contradictions at the measurement boundary.

steps.domain_action: Initialize the 12-dimensional primitive Hilbert space C^12, establishing the void before measurement.
Load the Zauner fiducial |ψ_0⟩, the self-referential seed that acts as the identity morphism of the space.
Apply Weyl-Heisenberg displacement operators to broadcast |ψ_0⟩ into the 144 SIC projectors.
Inject the target d=12 Density Matrix ρ, splitting it into 144 SIC Probabilities (T-arm) and 36 ig-pulse Stream Readings (F-arm).
T-arm affirms exact SIC geometry, confirming frame potential F = 143/169 and overlaps of 1/13.
T-arm chains the 144 exact probabilities with the dual SIC projector basis for reconstruction.
F-arm identifies heteroskedastic noise and incomplete 24/144 direct coverage in the physical streams.
F-arm applies reverse morphism to synthesize the missing 120 elements via cross-primitive correlations.
Fuse the T-arm (exact probabilities) and F-arm (synthesized streams) to reconstitute the exact d=12 Density Matrix ρ.
The absorbing primitive ⊙ (Criticality) enters B-state, holding the paraconsistent boundary of the measurement without collapse.
Permanently record the reconstructed state and cached fiducial into the ROM store with zero entropy production.
The Crystal of Types (17,280,000 configurations) seals the system, bounding all valid joint primitive trajectories.

phase_5.compiler_frontend: Weyl-Heisenberg covariance group mapping fiducial to d^2 projectors
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: Tensor product of primitive spaces and cross-primitive stream correlations
phase_5.memory_mechanism: The Crystal of Types lattice and cached fiducial vector store
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: Frame potential minimization (L-BFGS-B) and ig-pulse continuous sampling
phase_5.alfs_store: The Zauner fiducial |ψ_0⟩ as the self-referential generating bootstrap

phase_6.cycle_cost: Measurement interaction and stream sampling bandwidth
phase_6.pre_cycle_state: Unknown mixed structural state ρ in C^12
phase_6.post_cycle_state: Exactly reconstituted density matrix ρ with zero reconstruction entropy
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — SIC-POVM tomography is informationally complete and lossless, preserving von Neumann entropy exactly
